headlines.title: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Stock Looks Close To Fair Value Today
headlines.summary: Intuitive Surgical stock has returned 28.4% over the past five years, yet its current checks point to a company that is not clearly cheap, with an intrinsic value estimate from a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model sitting close to the market price while earnings based multiples lean expensive. Over five years, a 28.4% share price gain suggests Intuitive Surgical has rewarded patient holders, even though shorter term returns have been weaker.

headlines.title: Is Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Fairly Valued On Its Recall News?
headlines.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) is in focus after voluntarily recalling certain Da Vinci surgical system components tied to a potential E-brake pin issue. This development is prompting fresh attention on product risk and how it might factor into the stock. See our latest analysis for Intuitive Surgical. Against this backdrop, Intuitive Surgical’s short term share price momentum has softened, with the stock down 4.5% over the past week and 9.7% over the past 90 days.

headlines.title: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISRG) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: What You Should Know
headlines.summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISRG) closed at $406.78 in the latest trading session, marking a -1.16% move from the prior day.

headlines.title: ISRG to Report Q2 Results Next Week: Should You Buy the Stock Now?
headlines.summary: ISRG is set to report Q2 results on July 16, with sales and EPS expected to rise, while investors weigh margin pressure against strong adoption of da Vinci 5.

headlines.title: Is Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) One Of MedTech’s Best AI Stock To Buy?
headlines.summary: Intuitive Surgical Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) is one of the 10 Best AI Stocks to Watch in July. On July 6, Evercore ISI lowered its target price for Intuitive Surgical Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) to $430 from $480 and kept an In Line rating on the stock.

description: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. develops, manufactures, and markets products that enable physicians and healthcare providers to enhance the quality of and access to minimally invasive care in the United States and internationally. It offers the da Vinci Surgical System that enables surgical procedures using a minimally invasive approach; and Ion endoluminal system, which extends its commercial offerings beyond surgery into diagnostic endoluminal procedures enabling minimally invasive biopsies in the lung. The company also provides a suite of stapling, energy, and core instrumentation for its multi-port da Vinci surgical systems; progressive learning pathways to support the use of its technology; infrastructure of customer service and support specialists, a complement of services to its customers, including installation, repair, maintenance, 24/7 technical support, and proactive system health monitoring; and integrated digital capabilities providing connected offerings, streamlining performance for hospitals with program-enhancing insights. It sells its products through direct sales organizations, such as capital and clinical sales teams. Intuitive Surgical, Inc. was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Sunnyvale, California.
